---

## 1. M6a — correctness fixes (commit `34aadc6`)

Six fixes, each tested:

- **Literal `url()` / `calc()`** — lexer (`atRawCall`/`scanRawCall`) captures
  `url(...)` and `calc(...)` as single IDENT tokens with balanced parens, so
  slashes/operators/units survive. `{interpolation}` inside still resolves via the
  Ident interpolation path (`calc(100% - {g})` → `calc(100% - 16px)`).
- **`!important`** — `stripImportant` removes a trailing `NOT IDENT(important)` from
  declaration value tokens; `ast.Declaration.Important` → `css.Statement.Important`;
  rendered ` !important` (pretty) / `!important` (compressed).
- **`@media`/`@supports` query variables** — `evalAtVars` substitutes identifiers
  that resolve to defined variables, but only inside parentheses (depth>0), so
  `@media (min-width: bp)` works while `screen`/`and`/`print` stay literal.
  `compactAtHeader` also drops the space after query-list commas when compressed.
- **Selector comma-splitting** — `splitSelectors` rewritten to respect `()`, `[]`,
  and strings, so `a[href$="a,b"]` and `:not(.x, .y)` stay intact.
- **Whitespace-sensitive unary `-`/`+`** — `token.Token.SpaceBefore` is derived in
  the lexer from column gaps (`setSpacing`); the Pratt parser's `unaryPos` makes a
  sign with space-before/no-space-after start a new list term, so `margin 10px -5px`
  is a 2-item list while `10px - 5px` / `10px-5px` subtract.

Tests: `testdata/m6` golden; `m6_test.go` (16-case table + selector/important
checks); lexer tests for raw-calls and `SpaceBefore`.

## 2. Examples + skill + README (commit `52b15a2`)

- `examples/` — 10 runnable, feature-by-feature `.styl` files (01-variables …
  10-imports) + `imports/_theme.styl` partial + an index `examples/README.md`. All
  compile cleanly; comments reconciled against real output.
- `ai_docs/skill/SKILL.md` — detailed skill (YAML front-matter) covering the Go API,
  CLI, full language reference, the built-in catalog with signatures, gotchas, and
  recipes.
- README — added **Examples** and **Limitations** sections.

## 3. M6b — source maps (commit pending this session)

Goal: Source Map v3 mapping generated CSS back to the `.styl` source.

**Position plumbing**
- `ast.RuleSet`/`Declaration`/`AtRule` gained `Line, Col` (parser sets them from the
  line-tree: `lineNo` + `indent`+1).
- `css.Pos{Line, Col}` added to `css.Rule`/`Statement`/`AtRule`; eval copies the AST
  positions onto the emitted CSS nodes (including the bubbled rule and at-rule
  decl/keyframe blocks in `m5.go`).

**Renderer refactor (`css/print.go`)** — replaced the `Render(out, pretty)` signature
with `Render(p *Printer)`. The `Printer` tracks output line/col and depth-aware
indentation (dropped the post-hoc `indentBlock`); `renderNodes` inserts a blank line
between non-empty blocks in pretty mode (cleaner, position-friendly). `Node` gained
`hasOutput()`. `Printer.mark(pos)` records a source-map segment at the current output
position. *Only pretty `testdata/m5.css` changed (extra blank lines between top-level
blocks); all `.min.css` goldens are byte-identical.*

**Source map encoder (`css/sourcemap.go`)** — `SourceMap` collects
`{genLine,genCol,srcLine,srcCol}` segments, sorts them, and emits the Base64-VLQ
`mappings` string (generated column resets per line; source idx/line/col deltas
persist globally, per spec). `JSON()` produces the v3 doc
(`version/file/sources/sourcesContent/names/mappings`) with the original source
embedded so the map is self-contained.

**API + CLI**
- `eval.EvaluateMap` returns `(css, mapJSON, err)`; `Evaluate` and it share
  `evalNodes`.
- `styl.CompileMap` / `styl.CompileFileMap` (css, mapJSON, err) + `Options.OutFile`.
- CLI `-sourcemap` (requires `-o`): writes `<out>.map` and appends
  `/*# sourceMappingURL=… */`.

**Tests** — `internal/css/sourcemap_test.go` (VLQ known-values + a decode
round-trip); `m6b_test.go` (decodes the real map: version/file/sources/
sourcesContent/mappings, first segment `(0,0,0,0)`, compressed single-line map).
Manually decoded a nested+`@media` example end to end — every selector/property
maps to the correct source line/col.

## Verification (session end)

`go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, `gofmt -l .`, and a fresh `go test -count=1 ./...`
all clean / passing (now includes an `internal/css` test package).

CLI demo:
```
go run ./cmd/styl -o out.css -sourcemap app.styl
# -> out.css (with sourceMappingURL comment) + out.css.map (valid v3 JSON)
```

## Roadmap

- [x] M1–M5 (vertical slice → at-rules/brace syntax/compress parity)
- [x] M6a correctness cluster
- [x] M6b **source maps** (Source Map v3; `CompileMap` / `-sourcemap`)
- [ ] Future: value-level source mapping; deeper compress parity; more built-ins;
  bare-variable eval inside `url()`/`calc()`; mixed indentation+brace files

## Carry-forward limitations

- Source maps are selector/declaration/at-rule granular (not yet inside values).
- Variables in `url()`/`calc()` need `{interpolation}`; arithmetic in `@media`
  queries needs `{ }`.
- Brace mode: no stand-alone `{expr}` value (use the bare variable). One syntax per
  file.
- `MergeDuplicates` is non-standard extra compression (off by default).
